mapper.select: SELECT wq.id, wq.user_id AS userId, wq.question_id AS questionId, q.content AS questionContent, q.options, q.answer AS correctAnswer, q.analysis, wq.user_answer AS userAnswer, wq.wrong_count AS wrongCount, wq.last_wrong_time AS lastWrongTime, wq.status, wq.note, wq.created_at AS createdAt FROM wrong_question wq LEFT JOIN question q ON wq.question_id = q.id WHERE wq.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY wq.last_wrong_time DESC
SELECT * FROM wrong_question WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND question_id = #{questionId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO wrong_question (user_id, question_id, user_answer, wrong_count, status, note) VALUES (#{userId}, #{questionId}, #{userAnswer}, #{wrongCount}, #{status}, #{note})
mapper.update: UPDATE wrong_question SET wrong_count = wrong_count + 1, last_wrong_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
